allow: PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; $paths = @\('C:\\StashZero\\Tor Browser', 'C:\\StashZero\\Browser', 'C:\\StashZero\\Tor Browser.lnk', 'C:\\Users\\byGOG\\Desktop\\Tor Browser.lnk'\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "EXISTS: $p"; try { Remove-Item -Path $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "  REMOVED OK" } catch { Write-Output "  FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $p" } })
